# Third-party notices

Files_MacOS is built with open-source components, including:

- [.NET](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime), MIT License
- [Uno Platform](https://github.com/unoplatform/uno), Apache License 2.0
- [SkiaSharp](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp), MIT License
- [.NET Community Toolkit](https://github.com/CommunityToolkit/dotnet), MIT License

Additional transitive dependencies and their license metadata are listed in the NuGet packages restored for `src/Files.App.MacOS/Files.App.MacOS.csproj`.
